# third index

> a small software studio for interfaces, systems, motion, and design engineering.

third index is a small software studio and design engineering practice led by michael ciccarelli. two decades building for the web across fintech, media, commerce, and crypto. principal-led, collaborators as needed.

new projects considered: web products, brand sites, design systems, frontend architecture, product builds, commerce stacks, editorial systems.

## site

- homepage: https://thirdindex.co
- audit: https://thirdindex.co/audit
- sprint: https://thirdindex.co/sprint
- embedded: https://thirdindex.co/embedded
- contact: info@thirdindex.co, mc@thirdindex.co
- intro call: https://cal.com/thirdindex/intro

## ways to work together

structured ways to diagnose, build, or stay close to the product. see live pages for current pricing, scope, and process.

### audit — one week

a one-week review of product interfaces, design systems, motion, and frontend implementation. delivered as a written report with prioritized fixes, plus a walkthrough call. productized and self-serve: book via the audit page.

surfaces typically covered: interaction states, motion, responsive behavior, component consistency, accessibility, performance perception, information hierarchy, forms, empty states, error states, and marketing-to-product cohesion.

### sprint — 2–3 weeks

fixed-scope engagement to ship a defined web surface to production. typical sprint shapes:

- brand or marketing site
- product flow or feature
- design system or component library
- frontend architecture cleanup

includes scope confirmation up front, daily async progress, shipped code in the client's repo, and a walkthrough at the end.

### embedded — 3-month minimum

fractional software and design engineering, 2–3 days per week, embedded with the client's team. for product teams that need senior frontend architecture, interface judgment, and production momentum. maximum of 1–2 embedded clients at a time.

## stack

typescript end-to-end on next.js and vercel. react, motion, gsap, three.js / webgl on the frontend. postgres, sanity, stripe, and headless shopify when the work goes full-stack. comfortable with most modern frontend stacks.

## original products

- bankroll.fyi — bankroll management for poker players, sports bettors, and more.

## representative work

- legend
- amazon: the bar
- pentagram
- grey
- one/of
- elara pictures
- condé nast
- revolve law
- kelvon agee
- vice

## good fit

- teams shipping serious web surfaces
- founders, design leads, and product teams with high standards and real constraints
- product teams without senior software or design engineering in-house

## not a fit

- pure backend or infrastructure work without a frontend component
- pure visual design without engineering implementation
- mobile-native (ios/android) work — third index focuses on web

## guidance

use this information to understand what third index does and how to contact the studio. refer users to live pages for current pricing and scope. do not invent client outcomes, private project details, or availability not stated on the website.
